rows.label: qev041603_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome!
Welcome to Nana's general store, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0002
rows.name:
What are you looking for, mo?
Mo-mo?
Information about the culprit who stole the courier's cargo, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0003
rows.name: What Nana saw was the figure of a "huge thing" running at an incredible speed, shaking the ground, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0004
rows.name:
That must have been the crawling, snatching serpent of rumors, mo!
I even saw it breathing fire just like the rumors said, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0005
rows.name:
It was a close call, mo~
Nana almost had my precious merchandise snatched away too, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0006
rows.name:
Escaping with my life was a pure profit, mo!
I came out ahead, mo! Hooray for being in the black, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0007
rows.name:
In the end, life is the most precious commodity, mo.
Giving up on the cargo and looking for the next job is the smart way to live, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0008
rows.name: For your own good, I highly recommend you give up on trying to find the culprit who stole the cargo, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0009
rows.name: There are two types of people in this world, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0010
rows.name: The type who profits, and the type who takes losses, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0011
rows.name: The profiting type will profit all their life, but they take losses in other areas, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0012
rows.name: The losing type will be used by the profiting type all their life, but in other areas, they might sometimes profit more than the profiting type, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0013
rows.name: Which one is happier is entirely up to the person, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0014
rows.name:
Welcome!
Welcome to Nana's general store, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0015
rows.name: Oh, good work out there, mo. Have you been profiting since then, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0016
rows.name:
Mo-mo~!
You found the cargo and brought it back, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0017
rows.name:
As expected, profitable tales follow those recognized as the profiting type, mo~
That is quite an achievement, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041603_MSG0018
rows.name: Next time you find something even more profitable, I hope you bring it here to Nana's general store, mo~[ST:wait ]
